content:
Graphic Design Software: Provides a wide array of design tools necessary for creating high-quality, engaging visuals for property listings, social media content, and advertising materials. Estimated Cost: $100/month.

Social Media Manager (Hootsuite): Allows for the scheduling, posting, and analysis of social media content across multiple platforms, ensuring consistent engagement with our target audience. Estimated Cost: $250/month.

Email Marketing (Constant Contact): For email marketing campaigns, newsletters, and automated follow-ups with potential and past clients. Estimated Cost: $35/month.

SEO and Web Management Tools:

SEO Analysis (Ahrefs): Offers comprehensive insights into keyword performance, competitor analysis, and SEO optimization recommendations to improve the client's website ranking and visibility. Estimated Cost: $200/month.

Landing Page Builder (Unbounce): Facilitates the creation of optimized landing pages designed to convert visitors into leads, enhancing the effectiveness of our paid advertising campaigns. Estimated Cost: $250/month.
context: From document: Statement of Work (SOW) for Marketing Services for Florida Luxury… — chunk 6 (chunk 6/11)
